feedback.text: I'd like the games we pay for to be owned, not licensed to use. Game companies have too much power over consumers, able to shut down service withouth any notice as claimed in many of their Terms and Conditions or Terms of Use. It's unfair that consumers can't keep the product they paid for as it was in CD/DVD era. Mostly issue lies with "online only" games, that require working servers and internet connection to work in 1st place.
